σ.description: Sample standard deviation of birth weight, used as an estimate of the population standard deviation σ in the sample size formula.

Δ.description: Mean difference in birth weight (grams) to be detected in the hypothesis test.

power.description: Desired statistical power of the test (90%), which determines z₀.₉ = 1.28 used in the formula.

α.description: Significance level (two-sided) for the test, which determines z₀.₉₇₅ = 1.96 used in the formula.
